{"id":1115,"date":"2015-07-01T16:17:58","date_gmt":"2015-07-02T00:17:58","guid":{"rendered":"http://quantumsf.org/?page_id=1115"},"modified":"2024-09-19T13:24:41","modified_gmt":"2024-09-19T20:24:41","slug":"kids-class-schedule","status":"publish","type":"page","link":"https://quantumsf.org/kids-class-schedule/","title":{"rendered":"Kids Class Schedule"},"content":{"rendered":"

Kids classes are open to all experience levels. Beginners and new students are always welcome, and your first week of classes is free! Please let us know you are coming by scheduling an orientation and trial class using this quick form.

Class Schedule:

Monday: 4:30-5:30pm

Tuesday:       4:15–5:15pm

Wednesday: 5:15-6:00pm

Thursday:     4:15–5:15pm

Friday:           5:00–5:30pm (Kids Red Belt)

Friday:           5:30–6:30pm

Saturday:    10:00–11:00am

Please note that enrolled students are required to attend at least two classes per week (excluding vacations).

For our latest up-to-date schedule, please consult and subscribe to our Google Calendar:
